I'm a petite, easily-recognizable woman, living alone in a small town within a very religious country. As an atheist, I specified that I was not interested in dating people of faith, set my incoming requests to "match my filter preferences only" and, for safety and privacy, set the app to "hide all souls within 10 miles." Nevertheless, I keep receiving "love" from local, Catholic men... Not only is this a very poorly-designed app, it apparently also poses major security risks to its users.
